issues.title: Missing JOIN condition
issues.problem: The query pairs every customer with every order due to the absence of a JOIN condition.
issues.fix: FROM customers JOIN orders ON customers.customer_id = orders.customer_id

issues.title: Implicit join syntax
issues.problem: Using the old implicit join syntax can lead to confusion and errors.
issues.fix: FROM customers JOIN orders ON customers.customer_id = orders.customer_id

issues.title: Missing table aliases
issues.line: SELECT customers.name, orders.order_date FROM customers, orders
issues.problem: Table aliases are not used, making the query harder to read and maintain.
issues.fix: SELECT c.name, o.order_date FROM dim_customer c JOIN dim_orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id

review.corrected_sql: SELECT c.customer_name, o.transaction_date FROM sigma_analytics.dim_customer c JOIN sigma_analytics.fact_transactions o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
review.summary: The query had a critical correctness issue due to missing join condition, and readability issues due to implicit join syntax and missing table aliases.
